typography.installation: Ensure Google Fonts (Rajdhani, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono) are imported in index.css

structure.header: Top nav with Sentinel OSINT logo, semantic search bar (Ctrl+K), and user/role badges. Below top banner.
structure.sidebar_left: Narrow module icon navigator (w-16) + Collapsible Threat/Live Feed Panel (w-80 or w-96).
structure.center_stage: Takes remaining flexible width/height. Houses the 3D globe visualization.
structure.sidebar_right: Contextual details panel (COA, OSINT entity cards, Graph node details). Width w-80.
structure.bottom_timeline: Fixed or absolutely positioned overlay at the bottom covering the center width for the timeline/Gantt chart.

spacing.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm max 4px for sharp tactical feel

classified_banner.classes: w-full h-6 bg-[#A3D16B] text-black font-mono text-xs font-bold flex items-center justify-center tracking-widest z-50 sticky top-0 uppercase

threat_card.classes: flex flex-col p-4 bg-slate-900/50 border-l-2 hover:bg-slate-800/50 transition-colors border-y border-r border-slate-800
threat_card.interactions: Hover reveals metadata. Use mono font for timestamp on top right.

metric_tile.classes: p-4 border border-cyan-400/20 bg-black/40 flex flex-col gap-1 relative overflow-hidden
metric_tile.label: text-xs text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider

entity_profile.classes: p-4 border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/40 rounded-sm flex gap-4 items-start
entity_profile.tags: px-2 py-1 bg-slate-800 text-xs font-mono text-slate-300 rounded-sm

search_bar.classes: bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-700 text-sm font-mono text-cyan-100 px-4 py-2 w-full max-w-md focus:border-cyan-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-400 focus:outline-none placeholder-slate-500

file_upload.classes: border-2 border-dashed border-slate-700 p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-400 hover:border-cyan-400 hover:text-cyan-400 transition-all bg-black/20

visual_enhancers.scanlines: absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none bg-[linear-gradient(rgba(18,16,16,0)_50%,rgba(0,0,0,0.25)_50%),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,0,0,0.06),rgba(0,255,0,0.02),rgba(0,0,255,0.06))] bg-[length:100%_4px,3px_100%] z-40 opacity-20

animations.data_stream: Use framer-motion or react-fast-marquee for scrolling text (coordinates/logs)
animations.panel_reveal: Use Framer Motion with slight y-offset (e.g., y: 20 -> y: 0) and opacity fade in, staggered for list items.

libraries.3d_globe: react-globe.gl (ensure globeImageUrl uses a dark/night map or topology map, transparent background, with arcs for flight paths)
libraries.charts: recharts (for analytics dashboard KPIs and time-series)
libraries.graph_network: react-force-graph-2d or react-force-graph-3d for Relationship Graph Engine

satellite_map_bg.description: Satellite aerial view for potential map background or dashboard texture

tactical_ui_ref.description: Tech/processor pattern for background overlay texture

user_reference.description: Palantir Gotham-style reference dashboard provided by user

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. e.g. `data-testid="threat-card-critical"`

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn primitives, customized to remove standard SaaS look.

Implement the layout with a strict grid. The left panel, center globe, and right COA panel must fit within a dense 100vh viewport without unnecessary page scrolling, typical of command-center dashboards.
Use react-globe.gl in the center stage. Configure it with a dark/night texture, neon arcs for flights/ship paths, and rings/points for conflict heatmaps.
The header must feature the 'UNCLASSIFIED // NOTIONAL DATA' banner prominently at the very top.
Utilize glassmorphism techniques correctly as specified: backdrop-blur-xl paired with semi-transparent dark backgrounds and 1px cyan borders.
Add the grid background and subtle scanline overlays to the main container to establish the tactical HUD feel.
Ensure all text contrasts are accessible and follow the specific typography hierarchy (Rajdhani for headings, Plex Sans for body, JetBrains Mono for data points).
Include hover states and blinking severity indicators using the provided animation classes.
